poll.question: Jade has chosen Ryan, found her voice in his presence. Should she lean into this deepening bond—or reach out to Marcus, who's aching on the edges?

options.label: Deepen with Ryan
options.desc: She's earned this moment—let her have what she's found, undivided

options.label: Reach to Marcus
options.desc: Her courage could be contagious—pull him in before the distance hardens

in_play.label: Keep it unspoken
in_play.desc: Let the warmth stay simple; protect what you have
